title: ‘These are our people.’ Lebanon’s medics carry on through grief, injuries.
summary_full: As Israel and Hezbollah exchange fire, dozens of volunteers eat, sleep and pray at a small hospital, waiting to respond to the next airstrike.
summary_public: As Israel and Hezbollah exchange fire, dozens of volunteers eat, sleep and pray at a small hospital, waiting to respond to the next airstrike.

LB.label: neutral
